tasks.subject: Task 1: Participant table + token columns + migration/backfill
tasks.description:
Add DocumentParticipant model + ApiToken.expiresAt/scopes; migrate with one-time backfill (owner ∪ annotation ∪ comment ∪ review authors); seed owner participant in createDocument.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["prisma/schema.prisma", "prisma/migrations", "lib/documents.ts", "tests/unit/documents.test.ts"], "verifyCommand": "CI=true pnpm test:unit -- documents", "acceptanceCriteria": ["DocumentParticipant table with unique (documentId,userId)", "ApiToken.expiresAt + scopes default", "migration backfills existing docs", "createDocument seeds owner participant"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: lib/authz.ts guard + unit tests
tasks.description:
Implement ensureParticipant / isParticipant / isOwner / documentIdForAnnotation with unit tests (TDD).

```json:metadata
{"files": ["lib/authz.ts", "tests/unit/authz.test.ts"], "verifyCommand": "CI=true pnpm test:unit -- authz", "acceptanceCriteria": ["ensureParticipant joins/false-on-missing", "isParticipant check-only", "isOwner owner-only", "documentIdForAnnotation resolve/null"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: Scope document listing to participants (T-M1-17)
tasks.description:
listDocuments(userId) participant-scoped; wire GET /api/documents + home page to session user.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["lib/documents.ts", "app/api/documents/route.ts", "app/app/page.tsx", "tests/unit/documents.test.ts"], "verifyCommand": "CI=true pnpm test:unit -- documents", "acceptanceCriteria": ["listDocuments(userId) participant-scoped", "GET /api/documents passes user id", "home page session-guarded + scoped"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: Document read, page, and SSE guards (T-M1-10, T-M1-16)
tasks.description:
Auto-join on detail read + page (link-grant); gate SSE on isParticipant (404).

```json:metadata
{"files": ["app/api/documents/[id]/route.ts", "app/app/documents/[id]/page.tsx", "app/api/documents/[id]/stream/route.ts"], "verifyCommand": "CI=true pnpm exec tsc --noEmit", "acceptanceCriteria": ["GET detail auto-joins / 404 missing", "page auto-joins / notFound / login redirect", "stream 404 non-participant"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: Web write guards — versions/annotations/comments/reviews/thread (T-M1-11web/12/13/14)
tasks.description:
Owner-only version PATCH (403); participant-only annotate/review/comment/thread-status (404), resolving annotation sub-resources to document.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["app/api/documents/[id]/route.ts", "app/api/documents/[id]/annotations/route.ts", "app/api/documents/[id]/reviews/route.ts", "app/api/annotations/[id]/route.ts", "app/api/annotations/[id]/comments/route.ts"], "verifyCommand": "CI=true pnpm exec tsc --noEmit", "acceptanceCriteria": ["version PATCH owner-only 403", "annotate/review 404 non-participant", "comment/thread resolve+gate 404"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 6: Machine API hardening — token expiry/scope + owner-strict plans (T-M1-11machine/15/18 backend)
tasks.description:
verifyToken {user,scopes}+expiry reject; generateToken opts; machine routes owner(404)-then-scope(403); tokens POST accepts expiry/scopes.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["lib/tokens.ts", "lib/api.ts", "app/api/plans/route.ts", "app/api/plans/[id]/route.ts", "app/api/plans/[id]/feedback/route.ts", "app/api/tokens/route.ts", "tests/unit/tokens.test.ts"], "verifyCommand": "CI=true pnpm test:unit -- tokens && CI=true pnpm exec tsc --noEmit", "acceptanceCriteria": ["verifyToken {user,scopes}+expiry reject", "generateToken opts", "machine owner 404 + scope 403", "tokens POST expiry/scopes"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 7: Token-creation UI — expiry + scope (T-M1-18 frontend)
tasks.description:
TokenManager: expiry selector (Never/30/90/365) + scope checkboxes; send expiresInDays+scopes; preserve existing test hooks.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["components/TokenManager.tsx"], "verifyCommand": "CI=true pnpm exec tsc --noEmit", "acceptanceCriteria": ["expiry selector + scope checkboxes", "sends expiresInDays+scopes", "preserves existing test hooks"]}
```

tasks.description:
Add trustedOrigins from BETTER_AUTH_URL + optional TRUSTED_ORIGINS env to better-auth config.

{"files": ["lib/auth.ts"], "verifyCommand": "CI=true pnpm exec tsc --noEmit", "acceptanceCriteria": ["trustedOrigins from BETTER_AUTH_URL + TRUSTED_ORIGINS, filtered"]}

tasks.description:

{"files": ["lib/notifications.ts"], "verifyCommand": "CI=true pnpm test:unit -- notifications", "acceptanceCriteria": ["notifies participant rows except actor", "existing test passes"]}

tasks.subject: Task 10: End-to-end authorization matrix
tasks.description:
tests/e2e/authorization.spec.ts: two-user web matrix (link-grant, list isolation, owner-only edit 403/200, non-participant writes 404) + machine owner-strict (404/401). Then full suite for regressions.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["tests/e2e/authorization.spec.ts"], "verifyCommand": "lsof -ti:3000 | xargs kill -9 2>/dev/null; CI=true pnpm test:e2e -- authorization", "acceptanceCriteria": ["link-grant + list isolation", "owner-only edit 403/200", "non-participant writes 404", "machine owner-strict 404 + 401"]}
```
